description: Hyperparameter sensitivity analyses as reported in the paper appendix (tab:tau, tab:lambda, tab:modality, EMA-alpha prose). Final paper values; seeds {7, 42, 123, 777, 2024}.

annotation_thresholds_tau.description: Task-1 AUROC under relabeled PermissionBench thresholds (tau_low, tau_high); std <= 0.004. Default: tau_low = 0.05, tau_high = 0.70.

reward_weights_lambda.description: AIPR% / FRR% under varying (lambda1, lambda2), lambda3 = 1.0 fixed. Default: lambda1 = 10, lambda2 = 0.1.
reward_weights_lambda.note: At lambda1 = 5 the policy settles at 3.6% FRR despite an active dual: with a fixed step size the integral-only dual update grows too slowly within the training budget to compensate for weak shaping (PID-Lagrangian dual control is the standard remedy). The honest attribution is constraint-plus-shaping, not the dual alone.

encoder_modalities.description: Task-1 AUROC by encoder modality (std <= 0.005). T = text (BERT), C = code (CodeBERT), G = graph (GAT).
encoder_modalities.note: The descriptions-removed-for-all-records control reaches 0.944 AUROC, capping any description-presence shortcut contribution at 1.9 points.

ema_alpha.description: EMA smoothing sensitivity: alpha in {0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7}. Default alpha = 0.3. std <= 1.3 (PRR), 0.3 (FRR), 0.2 (latency).
ema_alpha.note: Budget feasibility maintained across all tested alpha values.
